case_title: JERRY ADAM IMMANUEL VS. EVA ADELFA ROMANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR A PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-06-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 1/3/13 TO DEFENDANT EVA ADELFA ROMANO, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMMANUEL, JERRY ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMANO, EVA ADELFA $3,925.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,925.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
